goal: is_local_ring[R](m) = (is_maximal_ideal[R](m) and forall(x0: R -> Bool) { is_maximal_ideal[R](x0) implies x0 = m })
proof: function[T0: CommRing](x0: T0 -> Bool) { (is_maximal_ideal[T0](x0) and forall(x1: T0 -> Bool) { not is_maximal_ideal[T0](x1) or x0 = x1 }) = is_local_ring[T0](x0) }[R](m)

goal: is_local_ring[R](m) = (is_maximal_ideal[R](m) and forall(x0: R -> Bool) { is_maximal_ideal[R](x0) implies x0 = m })
proof: function[T0: CommRing](x0: T0 -> Bool) { (is_maximal_ideal[T0](x0) and forall(x1: T0 -> Bool) { not is_maximal_ideal[T0](x1) or x0 = x1 }) = is_local_ring[T0](x0) }[R](m)
is_maximal_ideal[R](other)
is_local_ring[R](m)
is_maximal_ideal[R](m) and forall(x0: R -> Bool) { not is_maximal_ideal[R](x0) or x0 = m }
function(x0: R -> Bool) { not (is_maximal_ideal[R](x0) and x0 != m) }(other)
function[T0: lib(comm_semigroup).CommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }[F](x, x.inverse)
function[T0: Field](x0: T0) { x0 * x0.inverse = T0.1 or T0.0 = x0 }[F](x)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: T0) { T0.0 = x0 = zero_ideal[T0](x0) }[F](x)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: T0) { T0.0 = x0 = zero_ideal[T0](x0) }[F](x)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: LocalRing[T0]) { is_local_ring[T0](x0.maximal) }[R](lr)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: LocalRing[T0]) { is_local_ring[T0](x0.maximal) }[R](lr)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: LocalRing[T0]) { is_local_ring[T0](x0.maximal) }[R](lr)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: T0 -> Bool) { not MaximalIdeal.constraint[T0](x0) or exists(k0: MaximalIdeal[T0]) { MaximalIdeal.new[T0](x0) = Option.some[MaximalIdeal[T0]](k0) } }[R](lr.maximal)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: LocalRing[T0]) { LocalRing.new[T0](x0.maximal) = Option.some[LocalRing[T0]](x0) }[R](a)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: LocalRing[T0]) { LocalRing.new[T0](x0.maximal) = Option.some[LocalRing[T0]](x0) }[R](b)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { Option.some[T0](x0) != Option.some[T0](x1) or x0 = x1 }[LocalRing[R]](b, a)

function[T0: CommRing](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0 -> Bool, x2: T0) { not is_local_ring[T0](x0) or not is_maximal_ideal[T0](x1) or x0(x2) = x1(x2) }[R](lib(functions).identity_fn(lr).maximal, lr.as_maximal_ideal.contains, x)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: LocalRing[T0]) { is_local_ring[T0](x0.maximal) }[R](lib(functions).identity_fn(lr))
function[T0: CommRing](x0: MaximalIdeal[T0]) { is_maximal_ideal[T0](x0.contains) }[R](lr.as_maximal_ideal)
function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[LocalRing[R]](lr)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: T0 -> Bool) { x0(T0.1) != ideal_proper_constraint[T0](x0) }[R](non_units[R])
function[T0: CommRing] { ideal_proper_constraint[T0](non_units[T0]) }[R]

not forall(x0: R -> Bool) { not is_ideal[R](x0) or not ideal_subset[R](non_units[R], x0) or not ideal_proper_constraint[R](x0) or ideal_subset[R](x0, non_units[R]) } or not ideal_proper_constraint[R](non_units[R]) or not is_ideal[R](non_units[R])
let w0: R -> Bool satisfy { is_ideal[R](w0) and ideal_subset[R](non_units[R], w0) and ideal_proper_constraint[R](w0) and not ideal_subset[R](w0, non_units[R]) }
function[T0: CommRing](x0: T0 -> Bool) { not ideal_proper_constraint[T0](x0) or not is_ideal[T0](x0) or ideal_subset[T0](x0, non_units[T0]) }[R](w0)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: T0 -> Bool) { x0(T0.1) != ideal_proper_constraint[T0](x0) }[R](other)

goal: ideal_subset[R](other, non_units[R]) = forall(x0: R) { other(x0) implies non_units(x0) }
proof: function[T0: CommRing](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0 -> Bool) { forall(x2: T0) { not x0(x2) or x1(x2) } = ideal_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[R](other, non_units[R])
function[T0: CommRing](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { not ideal_proper_constraint[T0](x0) or not is_ideal[T0](x0) or not x0(x1) or x1.is_non_unit }[R](other, x)

goal: ideal_subset[R](non_units[R], other) = forall(x0: R) { non_units(x0) implies other(x0) }
proof: function[T0: CommRing](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0 -> Bool) { forall(x2: T0) { not x0(x2) or x1(x2) } = ideal_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[R](non_units[R], other)
(forall(x0: R) { not non_units(x0) or other(x0) } = true)
function(x0: R) { not (non_units(x0) and not other(x0)) }(x)

goal: is_local_ring[R](m) = (is_maximal_ideal[R](m) and forall(x0: R -> Bool) { is_maximal_ideal[R](x0) implies x0 = m })
proof: function[T0: CommRing](x0: T0 -> Bool) { (is_maximal_ideal[T0](x0) and forall(x1: T0 -> Bool) { not is_maximal_ideal[T0](x1) or x0 = x1 }) = is_local_ring[T0](x0) }[R](m)
not (is_maximal_ideal[R](m) and forall(x0: R -> Bool) { not is_maximal_ideal[R](x0) or x0 = m })
let w0: R -> Bool satisfy { is_maximal_ideal[R](w0) and m != w0 }
is_maximal_ideal[R](w0) and m != w0
let w1: R satisfy { w0(w1) != m(w1) }
function(x0: R -> Bool, x1: R) { not is_maximal_ideal[R](x0) or m(x1) = x0(x1) }(w0, w1)

goal: is_local_ring[F](zero_ideal[F]) = (is_maximal_ideal[F](zero_ideal[F]) and forall(x0: F -> Bool) { is_maximal_ideal[F](x0) implies x0 = zero_ideal[F] })
proof: function[T0: CommRing](x0: T0 -> Bool) { (is_maximal_ideal[T0](x0) and forall(x1: T0 -> Bool) { not is_maximal_ideal[T0](x1) or x0 = x1 }) = is_local_ring[T0](x0) }[F](zero_ideal[F])
not (is_maximal_ideal[F](zero_ideal[F]) and forall(x0: F -> Bool) { not is_maximal_ideal[F](x0) or zero_ideal[F] = x0 })
let w0: F -> Bool satisfy { is_maximal_ideal[F](w0) and zero_ideal[F] != w0 }
is_maximal_ideal[F](w0) and zero_ideal[F] != w0
let w1: F satisfy { w0(w1) != zero_ideal(w1) }
function(x0: F -> Bool, x1: F) { not is_maximal_ideal[F](x0) or zero_ideal(x1) = x0(x1) }(w0, w1)
